title: Hidden Tools
description: Hidden Tools – A Minecraft mod that adds craftable debug sticks, invisible light, and hidden item frames for seamless building and redstone engineering in survival mode. Perfect for mapmakers and technical players!
body:
Hidden Tools is a utility mod that adds elusive and debug-style items normally inaccessible in vanilla survival. Craft powerful hidden objects to enhance your builds and redstone contraptions without cheats or commands!

Features:
Debug Stick – Fine-tune block states (e.g., doors, slabs, lanterns) for precision building.

Invisible Light Source – Place hidden illumination for secret bases or atmospheric lighting.

Invisible Item Frame – Create seamless displays or conceal redstone components.

Perfect for:
🔹 Mapmakers – Build intricate designs without visual clutter.
🔹 Redstone Engineers – Hide light sources or wiring in complex machines.
🔹 Builders – Achieve clean, minimalist aesthetics with invisible frames and lighting.

Why Choose Hidden Tools?
✔ Survival-Friendly Crafting – No commands needed!
✔ Lightweight & Compatible – Works alongside other mods.
✔ Version Support – Configured for modern Minecraft editions.

Hidden Tools – The unseen essentials for creative genius!
